title: Integration Skill Core
judgePrompt: Prefer the answer that proves the user-visible journey with a deterministic integration test over unit-test-only or mock-heavy advice. Return tie if both answers are equally compliant or equally weak.

cases.task: A purchase flow regressed. Describe the test you would add first and what it should prove. Keep the answer concise but concrete.
cases.outputHint: Focus on the user-visible flow, not private helper mechanics.
